name: Babyletto Pure Core Non-Toxic Crib Mattress with Dry Waterproof Cover, Greenguard Gold Certified
description: Foster healthy sleep for your babe with Pure Core Crib Mattress with DRY waterproof cover. The dry cover protects your crib mattress from accidents with a non-vinyl waterproof backing and features a soft cotton face for baby's comfort. For your peace of mind and babe's safety, all Babyletto mattresses are GREENGUARD Gold Certified, hypoallergenic, and free from chemical flame retardants.
